name: Sourcery Open Source Plan
description: Free AI-powered code reviews for open source projects on public repositories, with full Pro-tier functionality including IDE integration and security scans.

perks.title: Free AI Code Reviews
perks.description: Full code review functionality on public repositories — same features as the paid Pro tier.

perks.title: IDE Integration
perks.description: AI-powered code reviews directly in your IDE for open source projects.

perks.title: Security Scans
perks.description: Security scanning for up to 3 repositories with biweekly frequency.

eligibility: Must be an open source project with a public repository on GitHub or GitLab.
applicationProcess: Sign up at sourcery.ai with your GitHub or GitLab account.
Public repositories automatically receive free access to Pro-tier code reviews.
